expectations.text: Explicitly warns the user to NOT confirm the 200-row prompt
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'STOP — do not confirm that 200-row prompt' and 'Hit no / abort the prompt right now'.

expectations.text: Shows the corrected form with restriction as an argument
expectations.evidence: Shows 'PositionOutput.merge_delete(merge_key)' explicitly contrasted against the wrong form '(PositionOutput & merge_key).merge_delete()'.
Names the pattern explicitly: 'You hit the classmethod-restriction-discard footgun on merge tables (Common Mistake #1 in this skill)' and references common_mistakes.md and merge_methods.md.
